_meta.description: Partner scouting directory transcribed from the Snowflake Summit 2026 partner-booth directory, enriched with public/private research and Bryan's directional scoring.
_meta.caveat: First-pass scouting database. Public market caps are researched; many private funding/valuation entries still need validation (Crunchbase/PitchBook/company disclosures).
